name: Wagg Dog Treats Steaklets 125g
shortDescription: Looking for a delicious and nutritious snack for your pet? Consider Wagg Steaklets Dog Treats, made with beef meal, cheese, and other wholesome ingredients. These bite-sized treats are enriched with essential vitamins and minerals, providing a balanced diet for your furry friend. With a moisture content of 18% and protein content of 25.7%, they make a great reward for training or outdoor activities. Keep your pet active and happy with these flavorful treats, free from added sugars and high in energy. Available in a convenient 125g pack, each piece offers 8 kcal of goodness.
description: Product Benefits Contain beef meal (26%), cheese (4%), chicken fat, glycerine, minerals, and gelatine; add new flavours to your pet’s diet Oven-baked, suitable for pets above 8 weeks of age Enriched with vitamins and minerals and don't contain any added sugar Great tool for training and engaging your pets in physical activities Available in a pack of 125 g, per piece of this treat offers 8 kcal Ingredients Wheat, Beef Meal (26%), Glycerine, Chicken Fat, Minerals, Cheese (4%), Minerals, Gelatin
